Skip to locales
Faber · porta · what do you read?

Faber lives in a semantic core — the HIR — not in any single rendering. Every locale below reads the same language in its own script and vocabulary. Choose your portal to enter the documentation, corpus, and tooling.

English en-US complete 
incipit {
  nota "Salve, Munde!"
}
English →
العربية ar partial 
بداية {
  اعرض "مرحبا، عالم"
}
العربية →
हिन्दी hi partial 
आरंभ {
  दिखाओ "नमस्ते, दुनिया"
}
हिन्दी →
ภาษาไทย th-TH partial 
เริ่ม {
  แสดง "สวัสดี, โลก"
}
ภาษาไทย →
Tiếng Việt vi partial 
bắtđầu {
  in "Xin chào, thế giới"
}
Tiếng Việt →
简体中文 zh-Hans partial 
入口 {
  显示 "你好，世界"
}
简体中文 →
繁體中文 zh-Hant partial 
入口 {
  顯示 "你好，世界"
}
繁體中文 →

Status: English is complete — all docs, corpus, and tooling pages are authored and rendered. The remaining locales are partial: packs and corpus pages are shipped for every locale shown here, but authored prose sections fall back to English. Full translation is an open community goal.

Agent index · Agent guide · Install
